metadata.name: Azure Classifier-Based Page Extraction
metadata.description: Classifies a multi-page document with Azure Document Intelligence to identify page ranges for each document type, then extracts a single segment as a blob. This linear template demonstrates the submit → poll → extract pattern. For multi-segment production use, replace the extractSegment node with a map node that iterates over a flattened array derived from labeledDocuments (see README).

documentId.description: Source document ID from the database

blobKey.description: Blob storage key for the source (multi-page) document

groupId.description: Group ID — must own the classifier specified by classifierName

classifierName.description: Name of the READY Azure Document Intelligence classifier to use

resultId.description: Azure DI operation ID returned by azureClassify.submit — consumed by the poll node

constructedClassifierName.description: Fully-qualified Azure DI classifier name built by azureClassify.submit (e.g. groupId__classifierName)

labeledDocuments.description: Classification result: Record<label, ClassifiedDocument[]> where ClassifiedDocument = { confidence: number, pageRange: { start: number, end: number } }

extractedSegmentBlobKey.description: Blob key of the page-range segment extracted by document.extractPageRange

metadata.note: Demo uses a static pageRange. In production, derive pageRange from ctx.labeledDocuments entries. For documents with multiple detected segments, replace this node with a map node — see README for the multi-segment pattern.
